testcase.failure:
capsys = <_pytest.capture.CaptureFixture object at 0x1078a7f50> samples_dir = PosixPath('/Users/nelsonmbigili/Desktop/Spring 2026/Software Analysis/migratelib-artifact/repos/ful1e5@clickgen__ce70d07a__toml__tomlkit/samples') x11_tmp_dir = PosixPath('/private/var/folders/01/v7wkp0nx73l4tyy9v0_96rgh0000gn/T/pytest-of-nelsonmbigili/pytest-79/x11_tmp2') hotspot = (100, 105)
def test_clickgen_raises(capsys, samples_dir, x11_tmp_dir, hotspot): fp = samples_dir / "sample.toml" with open(fp, "rb") as f: with mock.patch( "argparse.ArgumentParser.parse_args", return_value=argparse.Namespace( files=[f], output=x11_tmp_dir, hotspot_x=hotspot[0], hotspot_y=hotspot[1], sizes=SIZES, delay=DELAY, platform="all", ), ): main() captured = capsys.readouterr() > assert "Error occurred while processing sample.toml" in captured.err E assert 'Error occurred while processing sample.toml' in 'Error occurred while processing migratelib:
Traceback (most recent call last):
 File "/Users/nelsonmbigili/Desktop/Spring 2026/Software Analysis/migratelib-artifact/repos/ful1e5@clickgen__ce70d07a__toml__tomlkit/src/clickgen/scripts/clickgen.py", line 93, in main
 cursor = open_blob(blobs, hotspot, args.sizes, args.delay)
 ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
 File "/Users/nelsonmbigili/Desktop/Spring 2026/Software Analysis/migratelib-artifact/repos/ful1e5@clickgen__ce70d07a__toml__tomlkit/src/clickgen/parser/__init__.py", line 23, in open_blob
 raise ValueError("Unsupported file format")
ValueError: Unsupported file format
' E + where 'Error occurred while processing migratelib:

testcase.name: test_parse_toml_file
testcase.failure:
samples_dir = PosixPath('/Users/nelsonmbigili/Desktop/Spring 2026/Software Analysis/migratelib-artifact/repos/ful1e5@clickgen__ce70d07a__toml__tomlkit/samples')
def test_parse_toml_file(samples_dir: Path): fp = samples_dir / "sample.toml" > c: ClickgenConfig = parse_toml_file(fp) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/test_configparser.py:163: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ src/clickgen/configparser.py:151: in parse_toml_file d: Dict[str, Any] = tomlkit.load(file.read()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
fp = "[theme]
name = 'Sample'
comment = 'This is sample cursor theme'
website = 'https://www.example.com/'

[config]
...inter2]
png = 'wait-*.png'
win_name = 'Work'
x11_name = 'wait2'
x_hotspot = 100
y_hotspot = 100
win_sizes = 32
"
def load(fp: IO[str] | IO[bytes]) -> TOMLDocument: """ Load toml document from a file-like object. """ > return parse(fp.read()) ^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'str' object has no attribute 'read'
.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/tomlkit/api.py:77: AttributeError

testcase.name: test_parse_config_files
testcase.failure:
samples_dir = PosixPath('/Users/nelsonmbigili/Desktop/Spring 2026/Software Analysis/migratelib-artifact/repos/ful1e5@clickgen__ce70d07a__toml__tomlkit/samples')
def test_parse_config_files(samples_dir: Path): for ext in ["json", "yaml", "toml"]: fp = samples_dir / f"sample.{ext}" > c: ClickgenConfig = parse_config_file(fp) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/test_configparser.py:182: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ src/clickgen/configparser.py:196: in parse_config_file config = parse_toml_file(fp, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ src/clickgen/configparser.py:151: in parse_toml_file d: Dict[str, Any] = tomlkit.load(file.read()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
fp = "[theme]
name = 'Sample'
comment = 'This is sample cursor theme'
website = 'https://www.example.com/'

[config]
...inter2]
png = 'wait-*.png'
win_name = 'Work'
x11_name = 'wait2'
x_hotspot = 100
y_hotspot = 100
win_sizes = 32
"
def load(fp: IO[str] | IO[bytes]) -> TOMLDocument: """ Load toml document from a file-like object. """ > return parse(fp.read()) ^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'str' object has no attribute 'read'
.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/tomlkit/api.py:77: AttributeError
